recommendations.title: I Feel Pretty
recommendations.overview: A head injury causes a woman to develop an extraordinary amount of confidence and believe she's drop dead gorgeous.

recommendations.title: Mr. Magorium's Wonder Emporium
recommendations.overview: Molly Mahoney is the awkward and insecure manager of Mr. Magorium's Wonder Emporium—the strangest, most fantastic and most wonderful toy store in the world. After Mr. Magorium bequeaths the store to her, a dark and ominous change begins to take over

recommendations.title: Catering Christmas
recommendations.overview: A fledgling caterer, Molly Frost, is hired by Jean Harrison, the perfectionistic director of the renowned Harrison Foundation, to cater this year’s annual Christmas Gala dinner. Things get complicated when Molly falls for Jean’s nephew, Carson, 30s,

recommendations.title: Star Trek IV: The Voyage Home
recommendations.overview: When a huge alien probe enters the galaxy and begins to vaporize Earth's oceans, Kirk and his crew must travel back in time in order to bring back whales and save the planet.

recommendations.title: Saving Christmas
recommendations.overview: Kirk is enjoying the annual Christmas party extravaganza thrown by his sister until he realizes he needs to help out Christian, his brother-in-law who has a bad case of the bah-humbugs.

recommendations.title: Happy Anniversary
recommendations.overview: A quirky couple spends their three-year dating anniversary looking back at their relationship and contemplating whether they should break up.
